channel.title: flove making-of — moderation questions
channel.description: New moderation design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should abuse adjudication work in nety?
item.description:
• Jury system — Random jury of peers decides. Fair but slow. • Curator-only — Curators handle all abuse reports. Fast but centralized. • Hybrid — Curators for urgent, jury for complex. Balanced but more code. • Defer — Don't design yet — keep it abstract.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
